data_format_qualification.per_frame_smpl_meshes: NO — dataset does not ship per-frame SMPL meshes
data_format_qualification.smpl_parameters: NO — no SMPL parameters in the dataset
data_format_qualification.trajectory_ply: YES (full-trajectory point clouds, not per-frame meshes)
data_format_qualification.verdict: NOT QUALIFIED — no per-frame SMPL meshes for hand-to-opponent-surface distance

exact_unblock: Run the Harmony4D pipeline (GitHub: jyuntins/harmony4d) to produce per-frame SMPL meshes from video. Requires SMPL model + GPU. OR find a source with per-frame SMPL meshes already computed.
not_permitted: manufacture per-frame SMPL meshes from trajectory PLYs
use trajectory PLYs as per-frame proxy
required_for_gate: per-frame SMPL meshes in one coordinate frame -> hand-to-opponent-surface distance
